pr.title: Reimagine strategy pillars: rename, rebalance, add missing initiatives
pr.body:
## Summary
- Pillar names rewritten as action-driven, automation/flow-specific:
  - P1: **Make Every Automation Flow Work, Every Time**
  - P2: **Trigger Flows on What Customers Actually Do**
  - P3: **Let AI Build the Flow, Optimize the Send, and Pick the Channel**
- Rebalanced: moved deliverability/compliance (1.4.5, 1.4.6) from P3 → P1
- Added 5 Automation Reporting initiatives (1.2.1–1.2.5, $15,953/mo combined) to P1
- Added Free-plan CJB reinstatement (1.4.1) to P2
- Added cross-channel orchestration + AI anti-fatigue (5.1.3) to P3
- New section: **Addressed via Reimagining the Unified Builder** (4.1.3, 4.1.5, 4.2.2, 4.2.3)
- Title updated to "Reimagining Mailchimp Automation Flows"

## Test plan
- [ ] Open `cjb-workflow-health.html#strategy` and verify all 3 pillars + Unified Builder section render
- [ ] Confirm new pillar names are flow/automation-specific
- [ ] Verify reporting rows (5) in P1 and 1.4.1 in P2
- [ ] Confirm deliverability rows moved from P3 to P1


Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
pr.author: deepakp1308
